name: boofuzz (Network Protocol Fuzzer)

auth.notes: Local library; target network connectivity required

performance.notes: Network-bound; target response time determines throughput

agent_readiness.notes: Network protocol fuzzing successor to Sulley. from boofuzz import Session, Target, TCPSocketConnection. session = Session(target=Target(connection=TCPSocketConnection('127.0.0.1', 7777))). s_initialize('HTTP GET'). s_static(b'GET '). s_string('/index.html'). s_static(b' HTTP/1.1\r\n\r\n'). session.connect(s_get('HTTP GET')). session.fuzz(). Web interface on :26000. Crash detection: monitors process crash, ping, recv timeout. Callbacks: post_test_case_callbacks. s_size, s_byte, s_word, s_dword for length fields. s_block for grouped fields. Repeat: s_repeat(). Custom mutation: CustomMutator. Logging to SQLite.

gotchas: Requires isolated test environment — fuzzing can crash/damage targets
Protocol definition is verbose — must describe every field
Crash detection heuristics may miss subtle memory corruption
No coverage-guided fuzzing (use AFL++/libFuzzer for that)
best_when: Network protocol fuzzing for TCP/UDP services (FTP, HTTP, custom protocols)
Penetration testing automation for protocol implementations
Security research and CTF network challenge solving
When authorized testing of networked services for buffer overflows
avoid_when: File format fuzzing (use AFL++ or libFuzzer with atheris)
summary: boofuzz is a network protocol fuzzer (Sulley successor). Session(target=TCPSocketConnection('host', port)). s_static(), s_string(), s_byte() for protocol fields. session.fuzz(). Web UI at :26000. SQLite logging. Crash detection. GPL-2.0 by jtpereyda. For authorized network protocol security testing. Not coverage-guided. Verbose protocol definition. Requires isolated test environment.
